description: Build BookManager React component for ARES dashboard. Manage books from Firestore 'books' collection with add/edit/delete, export CSV. Props: {books, onUpdate}. Export default.
requirements: Display list of books from Firestore 'books' collection
Each book entry shows: title, author, year, status
Actions: Add Book (form modal), Edit (inline or modal), Delete (with confirmation), Export as CSV
Firestore operations: create, update, delete documents in 'books' collection
Tailwind dark theme consistent with ProjectCard/TaskQueue styling
context: Reference TaskQueue.js for list/table patterns. Use Firestore SDK for CRUD. Books schema: {id, title, author, year, status, createdAt}
